ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was made */,
  "time_left" TEXT /* Time left before the event starts */,
  "booking_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of booking */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client who made the booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the booking */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "event_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., pending, confirmed, canceled) */,
  "recurring_pattern" TEXT /* Recurring pattern for recurring events */,
  "recurring_end_date" TEXT /* End date for recurring events */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue for the booking */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., unpaid, paid) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the booking */,
  "booking_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES booking_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_booking_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_type_id") REFERENCES booking_types ("booking_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the client */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the client */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the client */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the client */,
  "client_type" TEXT /* Type of client (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the client belongs to */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account manager for the client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_account_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, organizer, attendee) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_types" (
  "booking_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the booking type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the booking type */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the booking type can be recurring */,
  "default_duration" TEXT /* Default duration for the booking type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the venue */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the venue */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the venue */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue (number of attendees) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the venue (comma-separated list) */,
  "rental_cost" TEXT /* Rental cost per hour for the venue */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the venue (e.g., available, unavailable) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the venue information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_venues_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_venues" (
  "booking_venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking-venue relationship */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "setup_requirements" TEXT /* Special setup requirements for the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking-venue relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking-venue relationship was last updated */,
  "setup_time" TEXT /* Setup time required for the event */,
  "cleanup_time" TEXT /* Cleanup time required after the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_venues_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_venues_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_equipment" (
  "booking_equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking-equipment relationship */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment required */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking-equipment relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking-equipment relationship was last updated */,
  "setup_time" TEXT /* Setup time required for the equipment */,
  "cleanup_time" TEXT /* Cleanup time required after the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_equipment_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_equipment_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment available */,
  "cost_per_unit" TEXT /* Cost per unit of the equipment */,
  "is_rental" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the equipment is for rental */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Last maintenance date of the equipment */,
  "next_maintenance" TEXT /* Next maintenance date of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_participants" (
  "booking_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking-participant relationship */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., organizer, attendee) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking-participant relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking-participant relationship was last updated */,
  "invitation_status" TEXT /* Invitation status (e.g., invited, confirmed, declined) */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., attending, not attending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_participants_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the status is final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, cancel) */,
  "action_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., system, user) */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the log entry is important */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_logs_action_by FOREIGN KEY ("action_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_logs_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or comment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was last updated */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., setup, follow-up) */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the note is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_notes_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "reminder_type" TEXT /* Type of reminder (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "reminder_at" TEXT /* Scheduled date and time for the reminder */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reminder was sent */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the reminder */,
  "reminder_status" TEXT /* Status of the reminder (e.g., sent, not sent) */,
  "reminder_message" TEXT /* Message content of the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_reminders_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_reminders_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)
